name: golf
creator: neiluj
description:
My best game so farrrr

9 “official” levels and 9 custom levels

INSTRUCTIONS :

  • back : key backspace

  • in the menu : up,down,ok

  • while choosing level : up,down,right,left,ok

  • while playing : toolbox,ok

  • while creating : up,down,right,left,ok,toolbox, press EXE when you are done (ok to place the element and toolbox to extend lenght or width while presssing arrow keys)
